subcodes.first_line: O Word of Love! I have loved thee before there was any before, and ere the heavens were created or the earth was made to rest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا کلمه الحب قد احببتک من قبل الذی لا قبل له و ماخلقت السموات و ماسکنت الارض و
subcodes.subjects: @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @symbolism, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
